parameters.payload: ={{ (() => { const b = ($json.body && typeof $json.body === 'object') ? $json.body : ($json || {}); const str = (v) => (v == null ? '' : String(v)).trim(); const source = str(b.source).toLowerCase(); const status = str(b.Status || b.status).toUpperCase(); const app = str(b.Name || b.name || b.app || b.application); const msg = str(b.msg || b.message || b.text || b.body || b.rcMessage); const titleIn = str(b.title || b.subject || b.subJect); const rawUrl = str(b.URL || b.url || b.executionUrl || b.runUrl || b.jobUrl); const msgUrl = ((msg.match(/https?:\/\/[^\s)\]>]+/i) || [])[0] || '').trim(); const isGoodUrl = (u) => /^https?:\/\/[^\s]+$/i.test(u) && !u.includes('<no value>') && !u.includes('undefined') && !u.includes('null'); const url = isGoodUrl(rawUrl) ? rawUrl : (isGoodUrl(msgUrl) ? msgUrl : ''); const inferSeverity = (explicit, text) => { const s = str(explicit).toLowerCase(); const t = str(text).toLowerCase(); if (s.includes('warn') || t.includes('warn')) return 'warning'; if (s.includes('success') || s.includes('ok') || s.includes('resolved') || t.includes('success') || t.includes('resolved')) return 'success'; if (s.includes('critical') || s.includes('error') || s.includes('fail') || t.includes('critical') || t.includes('error') || t.includes('fail')) return 'critical'; return 'info'; }; const out = {}; const isOutOfSync = source === 'argocd' || /out[\s-]?of[\s-]?sync/i.test(msg); if (isOutOfSync) { out.title = titleIn || 'ArgoCD OutOfSync'; const lines = []; if (app) lines.push('Application: ' + app); if (msg) lines.push('Message: ' + msg); if (url) lines.push('App URL: ' + url); out.body = lines.length ? lines.join('\n') : 'Application is out of sync.'; out.severity = 'info'; out.source = source || 'argocd'; if (url) { out.url = url; out.urlLabel = b.urlLabel || 'Open Application'; } return out; } if (status === 'UP' || status === 'DOWN') { const up = status === 'UP'; out.title = (up ? '🟢 UP' : '🔴 DOWN') + ' Uptime Monitor'; const lines = ['App: ' + (app || 'Unknown monitor')]; if (msg) lines.push('Message: ' + msg); if (url) lines.push('App URL: ' + url); out.body = lines.join('\n'); out.severity = up ? 'success' : inferSeverity(b.severity, 'critical'); out.source = source || 'status-cake'; if (url) { out.url = url; out.urlLabel = b.urlLabel || 'App URL'; } return out; } out.title = titleIn || (app ? ('Alert for ' + app) : 'Notification'); out.body = msg || (app ? ('Application ' + app + ' sent a notification.') : 'Notification received.'); out.severity = inferSeverity(b.severity, msg); out.source = source || 'generic-webhook'; if (url) { out.url = url; out.urlLabel = b.urlLabel || 'Open Details'; } return out; })() }}

={{ { title: (($json.body && $json.body.alert && $json.body.alert.severityLabel ? ={{ (() => { const b = $json.body || {}; const rawTitle = b.subJect || b.subject || b['=subJect'] || b.title || 'Workflow Execution Problem'; const primaryMsg = b.rcMessage || b.textMessage || b.body || b.message || 'Triggered from n8n'; const rawSeverity = (b.severity || b.errorCategory || '').toString().toLowerCase(); const severity = rawSeverity.includes('critical') || rawSeverity.includes('high') || rawSeverity.includes('error') ? 'critical' : rawSeverity.includes('warn') ? 'warning' : rawSeverity.includes('success') ? 'success' : 'info'; const detectedUrl = b.executionUrl || b.url || (typeof primaryMsg === 'string' ? ((primaryMsg.match(/https?:\/\/\S+/) || [''])[0]) : ''); const lines = []; if (b.rcMessage) lines.push('Message: ' + b.rcMessage); if (b.textMessage && b.textMessage !== b.rcMessage) lines.push('Text: ' + b.textMessage); if (b.rcChannel) lines.push('Channel: ' + b.rcChannel); if (b.count) lines.push('Count: ' + b.count); if (b.executionUrl) lines.push('Execution URL: ' + b.executionUrl); if (lines.length === 0) lines.push(String(primaryMsg)); const out = { title: String(rawTitle), body: lines.join('\n'), severity, source: b.source || 'n8n-put' }; if (detectedUrl) { out.url = String(detectedUrl); out.urlLabel = b.urlLabel || 'Open Execution'; } return out; })() }}

={{ (() => { const b = ($json.body && typeof $json.body === 'object') ? $json.body : {}; const s = (v) => (v == null ? '' : String(v)).trim(); const severityIn = s(b.severity).toLowerCase(); const severity = ['critical', 'warning', 'success', 'info'].includes(severityIn) ? severityIn : 'info'; return { title: s(b.title) || 'Provisioner Notification', body: s(b.msg || b.message || b.text || b.body) || 'Provisioner notification received.', severity, source: s(b.source) || 'provisioner' }; })() }}
